title: Is there a way to push Media Clippings to all users using the tool?
excerpt:
Hi everyone! 
In our organisation we use email primarily to push global emails such as Media Clippings etc. Is there a way to utilise the tool to do the same task? Would appreciate any ideas, thank you.

posts.author: Ultraviolet (A. Albaajari)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!
In our organisation we use email primarily to push global emails such as Media Clippings etc. Is there a way to utilise the tool to do the same task? Would appreciate any ideas, thank you.
